title: Count Unhappy Friends
hints: Map each friend to their current partner for O(1) lookup. Precompute preference ranks to quickly check if one friend is preferred over another.
Iterate through every friend x. For each, check all potential rivals u to see if they form an unhappy pair with x.
Friend x is unhappy if u is preferred over x's partner AND x is preferred over u's partner. Count each unhappy friend once.
